qa_pairs.question: When several threads are waiting on a condition variable, what function can be used to notify all of them that the condition is satisfied?
qa_pairs.answer: When several threads are waiting on a condition variable, `pthread_cond_broadcast` can be used to notify all of them that the condition is satisfied.

qa_pairs.question: What is the difference between `pthread_cond_signal` and `pthread_cond_broadcast` when multiple threads are waiting on a condition variable?
qa_pairs.answer: When multiple threads are waiting on a condition variable, `pthread_cond_signal` notifies a single waiting thread, chosen at random, that the condition is satisfied, while `pthread_cond_broadcast` notifies all waiting threads that the condition is satisfied.
